auth.label: Private API Key
auth.description: Recurly private API key used as the HTTP Basic Auth username with an empty password. Create or view keys on the Recurly API Credentials page: https://app.recurly.com/go/developer/api_keys.

actions.name: create_account
actions.description: Create a Recurly account from JSON-friendly account fields.

code.description: The unique account code. This cannot be changed after creation.

username.description: A secondary value for the account.

email.description: The email address used for account communication.

vatNumber.description: The VAT number of the account.

taxExempt.description: Whether the account should be exempt from tax.

preferredLocale.description: The locale Recurly should use for account emails.

preferredTimeZone.description: The IANA time zone name Recurly should use for account emails.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Recurly account.

anyOf.description: The account code.
The account email address when returned by Recurly.
The account first name when returned by Recurly.
The account last name when returned by Recurly.
The account company name when returned by Recurly.
The Recurly account state.
Whether the account has an active, canceled, future, or paused subscription.
Whether the account has a past-due invoice.
When the account was created.
When the account was last changed.

raw.description: The raw account object returned by Recurly.

actions.name: create_plan
actions.description: Create a fixed-price Recurly plan with one or more currencies.

unitAmount.description: The unit price for this currency.

currencies.description: The fixed-price currencies for this plan.

intervalUnit.description: Unit for the plan billing interval.

intervalLength.description: The number of interval units in each billing period.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a fixed-price Recurly plan.

anyOf.description: The Recurly plan state.
The Recurly plan pricing model.
The plan billing interval unit.
The number of interval units in each billing period.
When the plan was created.
When the plan was last changed.

raw.description: The raw plan object returned by Recurly.

actions.name: create_subscription
actions.description: Create a Recurly subscription for an existing account and plan.

planCode.description: The code of the Recurly plan to subscribe to.

collectionMethod.description: The collection method for the subscription.

poNumber.description: The purchase order number for manual invoicing.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Recurly subscription for an existing account.

anyOf.description: The subscription UUID.
The Recurly subscription state.
The ID of the account attached to the subscription.
The code of the account attached to the subscription.
The ID of the plan attached to the subscription.
The code of the plan attached to the subscription.
The subscription currency code.
The subscription unit price.
The subscription quantity.
When the current billing period ends.
When the subscription was created.
When the subscription was last changed.

raw.description: The raw subscription object returned by Recurly.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve one Recurly account by ID or code.

accountId.description: The Recurly account ID or code.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Recurly account.

anyOf.description: The account code.
The account email address when returned by Recurly.
The account first name when returned by Recurly.
The account last name when returned by Recurly.
The account company name when returned by Recurly.
The Recurly account state.
Whether the account has an active, canceled, future, or paused subscription.
Whether the account has a past-due invoice.
When the account was created.
When the account was last changed.

raw.description: The raw account object returned by Recurly.

actions.name: get_plan
actions.description: Retrieve one Recurly plan by ID or code.

planId.description: The Recurly plan ID or code.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Recurly plan.

anyOf.description: The Recurly plan state.
The Recurly plan pricing model.
The plan billing interval unit.
The number of interval units in each billing period.
When the plan was created.
When the plan was last changed.

raw.description: The raw plan object returned by Recurly.

actions.name: get_subscription
actions.description: Retrieve one Recurly subscription by ID or UUID.

subscriptionId.description: The Recurly subscription ID or UUID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Recurly subscription.

anyOf.description: The subscription UUID.
The Recurly subscription state.
The ID of the account attached to the subscription.
The code of the account attached to the subscription.
The ID of the plan attached to the subscription.
The code of the plan attached to the subscription.
The subscription currency code.
The subscription unit price.
The subscription quantity.
When the current billing period ends.
When the subscription was created.
When the subscription was last changed.

raw.description: The raw subscription object returned by Recurly.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Recurly accounts with pagination and common filters.

ids.description: Recurly resource IDs to fetch in one list call. Do not combine ids with other filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of Recurly records to return.

sort.description: The Recurly timestamp field used for sorting.

beginTime.description: Inclusively filter records by this ISO 8601 begin time when sorting by created_at or updated_at.

endTime.description: Inclusively filter records by this ISO 8601 end time when sorting by created_at or updated_at.

nextPath.description: The next path returned by a previous Recurly list response, such as /accounts?cursor=...

email.description: Filter for accounts with this exact email address.

subscriber.description: Filter for accounts with or without an active, canceled, or future subscription.

pastDue.description: Filter for accounts with an invoice in the past_due state.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Recurly accounts.

anyOf.description: The account code.
The account email address when returned by Recurly.
The account first name when returned by Recurly.
The account last name when returned by Recurly.
The account company name when returned by Recurly.
The Recurly account state.
Whether the account has an active, canceled, future, or paused subscription.
Whether the account has a past-due invoice.
When the account was created.
When the account was last changed.

raw.description: The raw account object returned by Recurly.

hasMore.description: Whether Recurly has more records after this page.

anyOf.description: The Recurly path for the next page when present.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Recurly account list response.

actions.name: update_account
actions.description: Update basic profile fields on a Recurly account.

accountId.description: The Recurly account ID or code.

username.description: A secondary value for the account.

email.description: The email address used for account communication.

vatNumber.description: The VAT number of the account.

taxExempt.description: Whether the account should be exempt from tax.

preferredLocale.description: The locale Recurly should use for account emails.

preferredTimeZone.description: The IANA time zone name Recurly should use for account emails.

inputSchema.description: Fields for updating a Recurly account.

anyOf.description: The account code.
The account email address when returned by Recurly.
The account first name when returned by Recurly.
The account last name when returned by Recurly.
The account company name when returned by Recurly.
The Recurly account state.
Whether the account has an active, canceled, future, or paused subscription.
Whether the account has a past-due invoice.
When the account was created.
When the account was last changed.

raw.description: The raw account object returned by Recurly.
